title: NBA Daily News Digest
subtitle: June 29, 2026 - Offseason Heats Up with Blockbuster Trades!

items.headline: Giannis Antetokounmpo Headed to Miami Heat in Blockbuster Trade!
items.summary: The Miami Heat have completed a monumental trade for Giannis Antetokounmpo and Bobby Portis from the Milwaukee Bucks, in a deal that sends Tyler Herro, Kel'el Ware, Jaime Jaquez Jr., Kasparas Jakučionis, and multiple draft picks to Milwaukee. This move dramatically reshapes the Eastern Conference ahead of the 2026-27 season.

items.headline: Miles Bridges Traded to Phoenix Suns as Hornets Continue Overhaul
items.summary: The Charlotte Hornets have traded forward Miles Bridges, along with a 2029 first-round pick and a 2027 second-round pick, to the Phoenix Suns. In return, Charlotte receives Grayson Allen, Royce O'Neale, and a 2033 first-round pick. This follows the Hornets' earlier trade of LaMelo Ball to Minnesota.

items.headline: Portland Trail Blazers Deem Deni Avdija 'Untouchable' Amid Trade Talks
items.summary: Despite being active in the trade market for star players like Jaylen Brown, the Portland Trail Blazers reportedly view Israeli forward Deni Avdija as untouchable in any potential deal. Avdija is coming off a career-best season where he averaged 24.4 points, 7.0 rebounds, and 6.6 assists in 48 games.

items.headline: No NBA Games Scheduled
items.summary: The NBA season concluded on June 13, 2026, with the NBA Finals. There were no NBA games played on June 28th, 2026, as the league is currently in its offseason. The NBA Summer League is scheduled to begin in July.

items.headline: Jalen Brunson Crowned 2026 NBA Finals MVP
items.statContext: Knicks PG led New York to championship, including 45 points in Game 5.

items.headline: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander Named 2025-26 NBA MVP
items.statContext: OKC Thunder star earned his second consecutive MVP award, leading his team to a 64-18 record.

items.headline: Victor Wembanyama's Dominant Season
items.statContext: Spurs phenom led the league in blocks per game and playoffs in total rebounds (239).

items.headline: AJ Dybantsa: 2026 NBA Draft Top Pick
items.statContext: Washington Wizards selected the highly-touted prospect, expected to make an immediate impact.

items.headline: Warriors Reportedly Eyeing LeBron James, Anthony Davis
items.summary: The Golden State Warriors are exploring an ambitious plan to pursue LeBron James in free agency and potentially acquire Anthony Davis in a trade to reshape their championship window.

items.headline: Dallas Mavericks Emerge in Kawhi Leonard Trade Talks
items.summary: The Dallas Mavericks are reportedly a surprise contender in trade speculation for Kawhi Leonard, with discussions possibly involving P.J. Washington, Klay Thompson, and future draft assets.

items.headline: Domantas Sabonis Eyeing Return After Knee Surgery
items.summary: Kings center Domantas Sabonis, who underwent season-ending knee surgery, is expected to rebound in the 2026-27 season. He posted his lowest averages since 2018-19 last year with 15.8 points, 11.4 rebounds, and 4.1 assists.

items.headline: Tyrese Haliburton to Miss 2025-26 Season with Torn Achilles
items.summary: Indiana Pacers star Tyrese Haliburton is expected to miss the entire 2025-26 NBA season after tearing his right Achilles tendon in Game 7 of the NBA Finals.

items.headline: New York Knicks Crowned 2026 NBA Champions
items.summary: The New York Knicks defeated the San Antonio Spurs 4-1 in the 2026 NBA Finals, clinching their first championship since 1973. Jalen Brunson was named Finals MVP.
